tf: Where Gratitude and Loyalty Lie

name: 狼
tf: Grrrrrrr...!

name: ホウライの青年
tf:
(My body will not move... Did I lose too much blood...? At this rate，I
will fall from the tree and become the wolf's prey...)

name: ホウライの青年
tf: (Am I going to die in a place like this...? How frustrating...)

name: ホウライの青年
tf: Forgive me... Father，Mother...

name: ハツネ
tf: Young Lord!

name: ホウライの青年
tf: What...!?

name: ホウライの青年
tf: Could it be... Hatsune，is that you...? Why are you here...!?

name: ハツネ
tf: I'll explain later! Please wait a moment!

name: 狼
tf: Grrrrrrr...!

name: ハツネ
tf: Now then，you beast! Bring it on! I'll be your opponent!

name: ホウライの青年
tf: Hatsune...! Be careful，that beast is dangerous!

name: ハツネ
tf: Understood!

name: 狼
tf: Grrf!

name: ハツネ
tf: (Fast...! But—)

name: 狼
tf: Grrf!?

name: ハツネ
tf: Don't think you can catch me that easily!

name: 狼
tf: Grrrrrroowl...!

name: ハツネ
tf: Come on...! I'll make you regret injuring the Young Lord!

name: 狼
tf: Grrf!

name: ハツネ
tf: Whoa!

Hatsune continued to dodge the wolf's fangs and claws by a hair's
breadth.

name: ハツネ
tf: Hah! Is that all you've got!

name: 狼
tf: Grrrrrrrrrrrrr...!

name: ハツネ
tf:
(I keep dodging its attacks，so it's getting more and more annoyed...
Should be about time now.)

name: 狼
tf: Grrrrr... Grrf!

name: ハツネ
tf: Whoa! What are you looking at! I'm over here...

Hatsune tried to evade the wolf's charge，but suddenly lost her
balance.

name: ハツネ
tf: Tch! Damn，I tripped on a tree root!

name: 狼
tf: Grrrf!
The wolf lunged at the off-balance Hatsune!

name: ホウライの青年
tf: H-Hatsune! Watch out!

name: ハツネ
tf: ...Just kidding!

name: <user>
tf:
Listen，first draw that wolf's attention. While you do that，I'll set the
trap.

name: ハツネ
tf: A trap...?

name: <user>
tf:
Yeah. The trees around here have branches that are soft and bendy.
Plus，there's plenty of vines.

name: <user>
tf:
With branches，vines，and whatever tools we have on hand，we should
be able to rig up a simple trap to catch that wolf.

name: ハツネ
tf: You can really do that...?

name: <user>
tf:
But that wolf is pretty clever. Kotono was caught off guard because
it attacked from downwind.

name: <user>
tf:
Probably，if we try to lead it straight into a trap，it'll get suspicious
and it won't work.

name: <user>
tf: That's where you come in.

name: ハツネ
tf: Me...?

name: <user>
tf:
Yeah. With your movements at the training ground，you should be able
to keep dodging the wolf's attacks. What do you think?

name: ハツネ
tf: That's... Yeah，I think I can do it.

name: <user>
tf:
Good. Thoroughly provoke and toy with him. Then，when he's
hot-headed...

name: ハツネ
tf: That's when we spring the trap!

name: <user>
tf: That's right. The success of this operation depends on you.

name: <user>
tf: —You're the one who will save the Young Lord.

name: ハツネ
tf: Yeah... of course! I'll do it!

name: ハツネ
tf: (He got all worked up and walked right into it!)

name: ハツネ
tf: Now!

The wolf charging at Hatsune got its legs tangled in the vines and was
hoisted into the air—!

name: 狼
tf: Gyaow! Grr! Grr，grr...!

name: ハツネ
tf: —No matter how much you howl，it's too late.

name: ハツネ
tf: Prepare yourself!
Slash—!

name: 狼
tf: Gyaow...!

name: <user>
tf: Alright，plan successful! As expected，Hatsune. Well done—

name: ハツネ
tf: Woooooh!

name: <user>
tf: Whoa! Hey，what's with the sudden hug...?

name: ハツネ
tf:
That's amazing，you! You took down the one that even Kotono messed
up against!

name: <user>
tf: I get it，I get it. Just calm down，all right?

name: ハツネ
tf: Ahaha! I feel like I can beat any enemy with you!

name: ハツネ
tf: ...*gasp*! Right，the Young Lord!

name: ホウライの青年
tf: Hatsune...

name: ハツネ
tf: Young Lord! Are you alright? We need to treat your wounds quickly...

name: ホウライの青年
tf:
Ah，I've already stopped the bleeding. I'm in your debt，Hatsune. And
you there...

name: <user>
tf: I'm %user%.

name: ホウライの青年
tf: Lord Commander...?

name: ホウライの青年
tf: ...By any chance，are you the Lord Commander of the Frontline Base?

name: <user>
tf: Something like that.

name: ハツネ
tf:
Come to think of it，they did call you that. What kind of position is
'Commaander'?

name: ホウライの青年
tf:
Hatsune，you didn't know...? He's the one entrusted with full
authority over the Frontline Base.

name: ハツネ
tf: Eh?! R-really! I think I've been acting rude without knowing it...

name: <user>
tf: I don't mind. It'd feel strange if you changed your tune now.

name: ハツネ
tf:
O-oh，really? Heh heh，even though you're such a big shot，you
helped us. You're a good guy，Commander!

name: ホウライの青年
tf: Thanks to you，my life has been saved. How can I ever repay you...

name: <user>
tf:
Don't worry about it. We took out a dangerous monster and kept
casualties to a minimum. All's well that ends well.

name: ホウライの青年
tf:
What a magnanimous person... Compared to you，I still have much to
learn.

name: ハツネ
tf: Young Lord...

name: ハツネ
tf: ... I picked this up on the way. Here，I'm returning it to you.

name: ホウライの青年
tf: The short sword my father gave me...

name: ハツネ
tf:
Let's return to Hourai，Young Lord.
The Lord is waiting for your return.

name: ホウライの青年
tf:
Hatsune... Does someone like me even deserve to hold this short
sword?

name: ハツネ
tf:
Of course.
You are the one who will become the next head of the clan...

name: ホウライの青年
tf:
I met Kotono at the Frontline Base and trained with her，thinking I
had grown stronger. But this pathetic state... I cannot face my father.

name: ハツネ
tf: Young Lord... what are you saying...

name: ホウライの青年
tf:
I apologize，Hatsune. I still cannot return to Hourai.
I wish to
remain at the Frontline Base a while longer and continue my training.

name: ハツネ
tf: Young Lord...

name: ハツネ
tf:
I understand.
Then I，Hatsune，will accompany you to the Frontline Base as well!

name: ホウライの青年
tf:
I see... I apologize，Hatsune.
With you here，I feel reassured.

name: ハツネ
tf:
I will protect you from any danger!
First，let's return to the Frontline Base and treat your wounds.
After that，%user% and the others returned safely to the Frontline Base.

name: <user>
tf:
Good to hear. That young man lost a lot of blood，but I hear his life
isn't in danger.
Seems like he'll be able to move in about a week.

name: ハツネ
tf: That's a relief...

name: ハツネ
tf: Commander. Thank you so much.

name: ハツネ
tf:
I couldn't have saved the Young Lord on my own...
I owe you a huge debt，Commander.

name: <user>
tf:
Don't worry about it.
If you weren't there，I would have lost a valuable person.

name: <user>
tf: So don't think of it as a debt.

name: ハツネ
tf:
No way!
A samurai repays a debt of gratitude!

name: ハツネ
tf:
I don't care if you say you don't need it，I'm definitely paying you
back!

name: <user>
tf: Alright，alright. You're a stubborn one，aren't you?

name: ハツネ
tf:
So，Commander，I'm thinking of staying at the Frontline Base with the
young master too，but...

name: ハツネ
tf: Um... if it's no trouble，could I help you with your work again?

name: ハツネ
tf:
I want to repay my debt，but also，just being here makes me feel like I
can get even stronger!

name: ハツネ
tf: I'll definitely prove useful to you，Commander! What do you think?

name: <user>
tf: What，you get all serious and that's all it is?

name: <user>
tf:
Of course，there's no reason to refuse. Having you here is reassuring
for the Frontline Base.

name: ハツネ
tf: R-really!? Ehehe，if you say so，I guess I've got no choice.

name: ハツネ
tf: When you're in trouble，I'll come help you out! So...

name: ハツネ
tf: Let's keep working together from now on，Commander!
